text: Hello? Hello? Are you there? Hello? Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Alabama State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Is this a tailor? Is this a tailor? Am I getting a real person here? Hello? Hello? I think it's my mic acting up. Thanks for the heads up. So, yeah, a lot of people in your area haven't been notified yet. I've got something to say. I really just want to help you get the big care. You do have both parts
